title: Kadaisi Bench Karthi
overview: Kadaisi Bench Karthi is an upcoming Indian Tamil comedy film directed by Ravi Bhargavan.  This Tamil-Telugu bilingual comedy showcases the effect that a smart phone can have on a loving relationship.
